title: Spicy Korean Naengmyeon Noodle Salad
description: A refreshing summer salad made with Korean naengmyeon noodles, spicy Korean chili flakes, and crisp cabbage. Perfect for a spicy kick on a hot day.
instructions: Cook the Korean naengmyeon noodles according to the package instructions. Drain and set aside.
In a large bowl, combine the thinly sliced cabbage and diced tender.
In a small bowl, whisk together the gochujang, soy sauce, and rice vinegar.
Add the cooked noodles to the bowl with the cabbage mixture and pour the dressing over the top.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve immediately and garnish with toasted sesame seeds and chopped green onions if desired.
Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Just before serving, sprinkle with toasted sesame seeds and chopped green onions if desired.
